name: behaviors.getForTask
description: Get relevant behaviors for a task BEFORE starting execution. This is the primary tool agents should call at the start of any task to retrieve applicable behaviors. Returns role-specific advisory and recommended behaviors. Per AGENTS.md: 'For every task, agents need to natively know how to find/manage behaviors via any surface (MCP, API, CLI)'.

task_description.description: Natural language description of the task to be performed. Be specific about the task context for better behavior matching.

role.description: Agent's current declared role. Used for role-specific advisory. Student (routine execution), Teacher (examples/validation), Strategist (novel patterns).

limit.description: Maximum number of behaviors to return

role_context.description: Optional role context for telemetry (emphasized for tracking role declarations)

actor.description: Optional actor context for audit logging

task_description.description: Echo of the input task description

role_advisory.description: Role-specific guidance for applying behaviors. Includes: role emoji, behaviors to apply, and escalation guidance.

instruction.description: Full procedural instruction for the behavior

recommended_behaviors.description: List of recommended behaviors for this task, sorted by relevance

examples.description: Get behaviors for adding logging to an endpoint

input.task_description: Add structured logging to the new /api/users endpoint

output.role_advisory:
📖 Role: Student
Apply these behaviors during execution: behavior_use_raze_for_logging
Cite each behavior in your work output.
If pattern occurs 3+ times without behavior, escalate to Strategist.

recommended_behaviors.name: behavior_use_raze_for_logging
recommended_behaviors.instruction: When adding logging: Import RazeLogger, configure sink, include context fields, use structured fields...
